center.name: 熱帶森林
center.summary: 熱帶森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联30种鸟类，包括孤䳍、茶臉鶉、Dark-backed wood quail等30种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.evidence: The black-collared lovebird is distributed across a wide range in African tropical closed rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The blue-headed crested flycatcher (Trochocercus nitens) is a species of bird in the family Monarchidae, native to the African tropical forest

birds.evidence: It is native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.evidence: The buff-spotted woodpecker is native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.evidence: It is native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits a variety of landscapes including the edges of humid tropical, terra firme, and swamp forests, and also transitional forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The typical habitat is lowland evergreen tropical forest including swampy areas, especially areas with dense undergrowth. It sometimes occurs in deciduous forest, and also in plantations, secondary growth forests and urban parks. Its altitude range is up to at least , and it is found higher than this on Java

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: & Donsker (2013) - IOC World Bird Names (version 3.3) It is found in the African tropical rainforest : Angola, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Gabon, Nigeria, Uganda and west of the Dahomey Gap in Guinea, Sierra Leone, Liberia, Ivory Coast and Ghana

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Mexico it ranges in elevation from near sea level to , and in Costa Rica occasionally up to that level but more commonly only as high as . The northern nightingale-wren inhabits the interior of lowland tropical forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to intra-tropical forests of Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-chested owlet (Glaucidium tephronotum) is a species of owl in the family Strigidae, native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The red-tailed greenbul (Criniger calurus), also known as the red-tailed bulbul, is a species of songbird in the bulbul family, Pycnonotidae, native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits tropical forest in Central Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the African tropical rainforest (western and sparsely throughout Central Africa)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The sandy scops owl has a scattered distribution across the African tropical rainforest ; it has been recorded from Guinea, Liberia, Ivory Coast, Ghana, Cameroon, Gabon, Congo, Democratic Republic of Congo and Central African Republic. The sandy scops owl occurs in lowland evergreen forest, open canopy forest and scrub, or in open forest mosaic land

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: marginatus, throughout Amazonia, from Venezuela, Ecuador, Colombia, Peru, and Bolivia to near the mouth of the river in Brazil The southern nightingale-wren inhabits the lower levels of dense humid tropical forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits humid tropical forest, open woodland, and forest dominated by Araucaria evergreens

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is mainly native to the African tropical rainforest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits a variety of landscapes including the edges of humid tropical, terra firme, and swamp forests, and also transitional forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The crested caracara is quite adaptable and hardy, for a species found predominantly in the neotropics; it can be found in a range of environments and ecosystems, including semi-arid and desert climates, maritime or coastal areas, subtropical and tropical forests, temperate regions, plains, swamps, and even in urban areas

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The solitary tinamou is found in lowland humid tropical forest and montane forests up to ASL. It readily inhabits secondary forest and can be not uncommon in extensively used plots, tolerating selective logging to some degree

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It inhabits open and semi-open spaces within humid lowland and higher tropical forest, and other landscapes such as gallery forest, swamp forests, secondary forest, and plantations

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: medianus, northeastern Amazonian Brazil south of the Amazon The pale-tailed barbthroat inhabits open and semi-open spaces within humid lowland and higher tropical forest, and other landscapes such as gallery forest, várzea and igapó swamp forests, and plantations

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species inhabits lowland tropical forest up to about of elevation

birds.evidence: The blue-winged pitta is regularly found in Brunei, Cambodia, China, India, Indonesia, Laos, Malaysia, Myanmar, the Philippines, Singapore, Thailand, and Vietnam, and has been found to be vagrant in Australia, Christmas Island, Taiwan and Hong Kong.
